title: 9 Herbal Creams for Night Shift Workers to Help Reduce Eye Bags
description: Aloe barbadensis creams have been used for centuries to help reduce the appearance of eye bags. This is due to the presence of properties such as glycoproteins and polysaccharides, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing effects on the skin. The cream's high water content and electrolyte balance also help to hydrate the skin, reducing puffiness and swelling.
